message:
Add SwarmConfig for weighted multi-project agent allocation (bd-2d366)

Implements tier-based agent allocation system:
- SwarmConfig struct with Tier1/2/3 thresholds and allocations
- AllocationSpec for CC/Cod/Gmi agent counts per tier
- DefaultSwarmConfig() with sensible defaults (disabled by default)
- ValidateSwarmConfig() with comprehensive validation
- GetAllocationForBeadCount() and GetTierName() helpers
- Full test coverage including TOML unmarshal verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
